lede: A look at November 13 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Emma Raducanu and Monique Coleman, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2022 University of Idaho murders
events.desc: A mass stabbing occurs in Moscow, Idaho in which four University of Idaho students are killed in off-campus housing.

events.title: High Court of Australia
events.desc: The High Court of Australia rules in Dietrich v The Queen that although there is no absolute right to have publicly funded counsel, in most circumstances a judge should grant any request for an adjournment or stay when an accused is unrepresented.

events.title: Nevado del Ruiz
events.desc: The volcano Nevado del Ruiz erupts and melts a glacier, causing a lahar (volcanic mudslide) that buries Armero, Colombia, killing approximately 23,000 people.

events.title: Walt Disney
events.desc: Walt Disney's animated musical film Fantasia is first released at New York's Broadway Theatre, on the first night of a roadshow.

events.title: Holland Tunnel
events.desc: The Holland Tunnel opens to traffic as the first Hudson River vehicle tunnel linking New Jersey to New York City.

events.title: Zaian War
events.desc: Zaian War: Berber tribesmen inflict the heaviest defeat of French forces in Morocco at the Battle of El Herri.

events.title: Ras Al Khaimah
events.desc: A British flotilla arrived at Ras Al Khaimah and launched an amphibious assault on the town, as a part of the Persian Gulf campaign of 1809.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: Patriot revolutionary forces under Gen. Richard Montgomery occupy Montreal.

events.title: First English Civil War
events.desc: First English Civil War: Battle of Turnham Green: The Royalist forces withdraw in the face of the Parliamentarian army and fail to take London.

events.title: Æthelred the Unready
events.desc: English king Æthelred II orders the killing of all Danes in England, known today as the St. Brice's Day massacre.

deaths.text: Juan Ponce Enrile, Filipino politician and lawyer
Luis García Berlanga, Spanish director and screenwriter
Annius of Viterbo, Italian friar, historian, and scholar

observances.text: Christian feast day: Eugenius II of Toledo
Christian feast day: John Chrysostom (Eastern Orthodox, Repose)
